---
title: "Mathias Abitbol"
image: images/portrait.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - text: CV
      href: files/CV.pdf
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iJlQGsEAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0006-5006-4514
    - text: IDEAS/RePEc
      href: https://econpapers.repec.org/RAS/pab605.htm
---

I am a researcher in economics affiliated with the Ecole normale supérieure - PSL.

My research lies at the intersection of environmental economics,
innovation, artificial intelligence, and industrial organization.
I am particularly interested in how new technologies affect energy use,
production processes, and the transition toward a low-carbon economy.

## Research interests

Environmental economics · Artificial intelligence · Energy economics ·
Innovation · Industrial decarbonization

## Current research

My current work studies the economic and environmental consequences of artificial intelligence adoption, with a particular focus on energy-intensive industrial processes.

[See my research](research.qmd)

## Contact

Institution\
Department\
Professional email
